rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically foundational to the citing study: both are structural ketchup-market models that jointly handle household demand, manufacturer/retailer pricing, and price endogeneity (as described in both notes). The citing paper’s design explicitly uses a latent-class demand model with endogeneity correction plus supply-side estimation in ketchup and frames itself as extending prior empirical work, so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
